column2: mutate(user_id = cur_group_id()) %>%  # Assign unique ID per combination
# Step 1: Create a count of overlaps per condition
# Step 2: Fit a GLMM to see if overlap counts differ by condition

glm(formula = count ~ condition, family = poisson(link = "log"), 
    data = overlap_counts)
Null deviance: 1.5269e+01  on 2  degrees of freedom
Residual deviance: 6.6613e-16  on 0  degrees of freedom
